events.outcomes: Observed review-side outcomes, including rating, verified_purchase, and helpful_vote.
events.panelist_features: Persona attributes copied from the imported PersonaRecord.
events.policy: Set to 'manual' for observational imported events in v0.
events.product_display: Panelist-facing stimulus text, defaulting to product display_text or display_name.
events.product_features: Product attributes copied from the imported ProductRecord.
events.product_id: Canonical product identifier linked by parent_asin.
events.t: Timestamp-derived integer time index. Default is within-panelist chronological sequence.
events.traces: Mapped review text fields plus optional structured source payload such as child asin.

personas.attributes: Derived behavioral summaries from review history; copied into event panelist_features.
personas.persona_id: Canonical persona identifier built from Amazon user_id.
personas.persona_text: Optional runtime persona prompt; left null for source-derived records.
personas.provenance: Source lineage for the imported persona record.
personas.spec_key: Stable hash of schema_version, persona_id, and attributes, when present.
personas.text_key: Stable hash of persona_text, when present.

products.attributes: Structured product metadata used for policies, outcomes, and event product_features.
products.display_name: Human-facing product title from metadata title.
products.display_text: Human-facing product text from metadata description, with optional fallback to features.
products.meta: Source-specific auxiliary metadata and optional raw payload.
products.product_id: Canonical product identifier built from metadata parent_asin.
products.provenance: Source lineage for the imported product record.
products.spec_key: Stable hash of schema_version, product_id, and attributes.
products.text_key: Stable hash of display_text, when present.
